title: Count errors by service from log lines
description: Given log lines in the format `timestamp service level message`, return a dictionary counting ERROR lines by service.

examples.input: ["10:00 api ERROR timeout", "10:01 web INFO ok", "10:02 api ERROR db"]

constraints: Each line has at least four whitespace-separated fields.
Only count lines where the third field is exactly ERROR.

hint_plan.level_2: The service is field 2 and the level is field 3 if counting from 1.

canonical_solution_summary: Loop through log lines, split, filter ERROR level, and increment counts by service.
